levels.name: Beginner
levels.description: New to structured fitness training. Learning fundamental movement patterns.

levels.name: Beginner+
levels.description: Basic movements mastered. Building consistency and work capacity.

levels.name: Intermediate
levels.description: Solid fundamentals across all categories. Handles moderate loads with good form.

levels.name: Intermediate+
levels.description: Competent athlete proficient across all fitness domains. Requires periodized programming.

levels.name: Advanced
levels.description: Strong and skilled across all categories. Competition-capable.

levels.name: Advanced+
levels.description: Very strong and highly skilled. Competition-level fitness across all domains.

levels.name: Rx
levels.description: Elite-level performance. Top 5% of trained athletes.
